props.ChoiceText: Load, prime, shoulder, wait, fire, and begin again taught your body a rhythm your nerves had not agreed to.
props.ChoiceBio: Learning the drill taught you that obedience can be measured in seconds, sparks, and bitten cartridges.

0.TransitionText: Because learning the drill taught you that obedience can be measured in seconds, sparks, and bitten cartridges, powder, discipline, and nerve remained your chosen life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because learning the drill taught you that obedience can be measured in seconds, sparks, and bitten cartridges, fortune stripped away distinction and returned you to plain soldiering.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Infantry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because learning the drill taught you that obedience can be measured in seconds, sparks, and bitten cartridges, drilled violence ripened into authority.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
